**Agent Framework** is Microsoft's production agent framework, supporting tool use, planner/critic patterns, memory, and multi-agent workflows. v1.0 stable, MIT-style license.

What's different: native MCP server integration, deterministic replay via run-id, and a structured workflow DSL. Production-deployed across multiple Microsoft surfaces.

- [official] https://aka.ms/agent-framework
- [field report] Microsoft 365 Copilot integration write-up.
